meta.title: Leon · Engineering AI workflows that ship
meta.description: Personal site of Leon. AI Engineering Practitioner & Course Builder, backed by 10 years of Java backend architecture. Claude Code, Agentic Coding, and AI workflow notes.

hero.lede:
Leon · AI Engineering Practitioner & Course Builder.
10 years of Java backend behind, turning AI collaboration from demo into methodology.

about.label: About
about.lede: Bringing engineering rigor to AI — not prompt-poking demos, but turning interview, design, build, and review into a reusable practice.
about.role01Desc: Claude Code · Agentic Coding · MCP · Claude API. Courses: AiCoding Practical v2.0, AI Creator Bootcamp.
about.role02Desc: Spring Cloud / Kafka / Redis at source level; high-concurrency distributed systems; JVM tuning; 4 years leading a 6-person team.
about.role03Desc: Daily AI news automation plus original writing; Xiaohongshu tools and workflow shares — in language developers actually use.

projects.label: Projects
projects.lede: Independent tools and methodologies across macOS, web, and AI workflows.
projects.energyDayDesc: Daily energy management with AI-assisted review. Turns "how was today" into trackable data.
projects.landrDesc: Landing page builder. Compresses "a launchable landing page" into a coffee break.
projects.clipShotDesc: macOS menu bar tool — clipboard image to OSS, returns a Markdown link.
projects.speakDeckDesc: Claude Code–powered talk pipeline: HTML slides + voice narration, fully auto-generated.

writing.label: Writing
writing.lede: Synced daily from WeChat «AI Workbench» and Xiaohongshu.

contact.label: Contact
contact.lede: Open to collaborations, consulting, and course questions. Usually reply within 24h.
